title: CompetitiveTrend
description: L3+ — per-persona competitive trend across DATED collection snapshots. Longevity (running_days = today − started_at, the only single-snapshot signal) + per-advertiser variation, plus cross-snapshot new/disappeared/cadence which appear ONLY with ≥2 dated snapshots. Honesty rule: temporal fields are OMITTED (never null/0-filled) when unsupported; every gap is a coverage_flag. synthesis (+ confidence_note) are added ON TOP by competitive-analyst (it recomputes nothing).

snapshot_count.description: total snapshots aggregated (dated + undated); all contribute to longevity/variation

dated_snapshot_count.description: subset with a parseable captured_at — the change-over-time basis (new/disappeared/cadence need ≥2)

running_days.description: today − started_at; present only when started_at was captured

still_present.description: appeared in the most recent dated snapshot; present only when the ad was seen in ≥1 dated snapshot

observed_span_days.description: last_seen − first_seen; present only when the ad spans ≥2 dated snapshots

longevity_top_k.description: ads with started_at ranked by running_days desc (longevity = winner proxy). Ads lacking started_at are excluded, not zero-ranked.

advertisers.description: per-advertiser creative variation (distinct ads) — available from a single snapshot.

new_since_last.description: library_ids present in the latest dated snapshot but not the previous one. Absent (not []) when <2 dated snapshots.

disappeared_since_last.description: library_ids in the previous dated snapshot but gone from the latest (turned off / ended). Absent when <2 dated snapshots.

cadence_new_ads_per_week.description: new distinct ads first seen after the earliest snapshot, normalized per week. Absent when <2 dated snapshots or zero span.

synthesis.description: Korean interpretive narrative added by competitive-analyst ON TOP of the deterministic numbers (recomputes nothing).
